title: Prevent adding a category with an empty name
description: Verifies required-name validation appears and no category is added when trying to add an empty category.

steps.description: Click "Agregar" button to add a category
Verify text "El nombre es requerido" is visible

title: Delete an existing category from the list
description: Verifies that a category can be removed using its Eliminar button and disappears from the list.

steps.description: Fill "Comida" into the category name input
Click "Agregar" button to add a category

title: Add multiple distinct categories and confirm both are listed
description: Verifies that adding more than one category results in each category being displayed in the categories list.

steps.description: Fill "Comida" into the category name input
Click "Agregar" button to add a category
Fill "Transporte" into the category name input
Click "Agregar" button to add a category

title: Input and list state persists after switching tabs
description: Verifies that an added category remains visible after leaving the Categorias tab and returning to it (SPA navigation).

steps.description: Fill "Comida" into the category name input
Click "Agregar" button to add a category

title: Add a bank account (Cuenta) and verify formatted balance in list
description: Verifies a user can add a new bank account and the balance is displayed with currency formatting.

steps.description: Fill "Cuenta Nómina" into the account name input
Select "Cuenta" from the account type dropdown
Fill "1000.00" into the initial balance input
Click "Agregar" button to add an account

title: Add a credit card account (Tarjeta de crédito) and verify it appears in list
description: Verifies a user can add a credit card type account and it is listed after saving.

steps.description: Fill "Tarjeta Visa" into the account name input
Select "Tarjeta de crédito" from the account type dropdown
Fill "2500" into the initial balance input
Click "Agregar" button to add an account

title: Validation: missing account name shows required-fields error and does not add account
description: Verifies the form blocks creation when the account name is empty and shows the correct validation message.

steps.description: Fill "" into the account name input
Select "Cuenta" from the account type dropdown
Fill "100" into the initial balance input
Click "Agregar" button to add an account
Verify text "Todos los campos son obligatorios" is visible
Verify text "Cuenta sin nombre" is not visible

title: Validation: missing initial balance shows required-fields error and does not add account
description: Verifies the form blocks creation when the initial balance is empty and shows the correct validation message.

steps.description: Fill "Cuenta Efectivo" into the account name input
Select "Cuenta" from the account type dropdown
Fill "" into the initial balance input
Click "Agregar" button to add an account
Verify text "Todos los campos son obligatorios" is visible
Verify text "Cuenta Efectivo" is not visible

title: Delete an existing account and verify it is removed from the accounts list
description: Verifies a user can delete an account and it disappears from the accounts list.

steps.description: Fill "Cuenta Temporal" into the account name input
Select "Cuenta" from the account type dropdown
Fill "10" into the initial balance input
Click "Agregar" button to add an account

title: Delete account referenced by a transaction shows placeholder label "Cuenta eliminada" in Transacciones
description: Verifies that after deleting an account, any transaction that referenced it displays "Cuenta eliminada" where the account name would appear.

steps.description: Fill "Cuenta Para Borrar" into the account name input
Select "Cuenta" from the account type dropdown
Fill "50" into the initial balance input
Click "Agregar" button to add an account
Click "Eliminar" button on account "Cuenta Para Borrar"

title: Currency formatting: initial balance with decimals displays as two-decimal currency
description: Verifies a balance entered with decimals is displayed in standard currency format with two decimal places.

steps.description: Fill "Cuenta Decimales" into the account name input
Select "Cuenta" from the account type dropdown
Fill "1234.5" into the initial balance input
Click "Agregar" button to add an account

title: List persistence within session: added account remains visible after switching tabs
description: Verifies the accounts list retains the newly added account after navigating away to another tab and back.

steps.description: Fill "Cuenta Persistente" into the account name input
Select "Cuenta" from the account type dropdown
Fill "200" into the initial balance input
Click "Agregar" button to add an account

title: Agregar una transacción de gasto con categoría y cuenta actualiza el listado y el balance
description: Verifica que se pueda registrar un gasto con categoría, cuenta y fecha, que aparezca en la lista y que el balance de la cuenta disminuya.

steps.description: Fill "Compra café" into the transaction description field
Select "gasto" from the transaction type dropdown
Type "35.50" into the transaction amount field
Select "Cuenta Nómina" from the account dropdown
Pick date "2026-02-21" in the date field
Click "Agregar" button to add the transaction

title: Validación: no permite agregar transacción con monto 0.00
description: Verifica que el formulario muestre un error de validación cuando el monto es 0.00 y que no se agregue una transacción.

steps.description: Type "0.00" into the transaction amount field
Click "Agregar" button to add the transaction
Verify text "El monto debe ser al menos 0.01" is visible

title: Agregar una transacción de ingreso aumenta el balance de la cuenta
description: Verifica que un ingreso se registre correctamente y que el balance de la cuenta aumente en el monto indicado.

steps.description: Fill "Pago salario" into the transaction description field
Select "ingreso" from the transaction type dropdown
Type "1000.00" into the transaction amount field
Select "Cuenta Nómina" from the account dropdown
Pick date "2026-02-21" in the date field
Click "Agregar" button to add the transaction

title: Agregar transacción sin categoría (opcional) se guarda y aparece en la lista
description: Verifica que la categoría sea opcional y que la transacción se pueda agregar seleccionando solo cuenta, tipo, monto y fecha.

steps.description: Fill "Transacción sin categoría" into the transaction description field
Select "gasto" from the transaction type dropdown
Type "10.00" into the transaction amount field
Select "Cuenta Nómina" from the account dropdown
Pick date "2026-02-21" in the date field
Click "Agregar" button to add the transaction
Verify text "Transacción sin categoría" is visible

title: Validación: monto no numérico muestra error y no agrega transacción
description: Verifica que el sistema rechace montos inválidos (no numéricos) mostrando un error visible y sin crear una transacción.

steps.description: Fill "Monto inválido" into the transaction description field
Select "gasto" from the transaction type dropdown
Type "abc" into the transaction amount field
Click "Agregar" button to add the transaction
Verify text "Monto inválido" is not visible

title: Validación: descripción vacía no permite agregar transacción
description: Verifica que no se pueda guardar una transacción sin descripción y que se muestre un mensaje de validación visible.

steps.description: Select "gasto" from the transaction type dropdown
Type "5.00" into the transaction amount field
Select "Cuenta Nómina" from the account dropdown
Click "Agregar" button to add the transaction

title: Insights: Render monthly summary, chart, and top lists for a selected month with data
description: Verifies that selecting a specific year and month shows the monthly totals, daily chart, and populated top lists when transactions exist.

steps.description: Verify element "daily totals bar chart" is visible

title: Insights: Top expenses and top income lists are visible for selected month
description: Verifies that the top expenses and top income sections render and show list content when data exists for the selected month.

steps.description: Verify element "top expenses list" is visible
Verify element "top income list" is visible

title: Insights: Empty state for a month/year with no transactions
description: Verifies that selecting a month with no transactions shows the expected empty state message and empty placeholders.

steps.description: Verify text "No hay transacciones para este mes" is visible
Verify element "daily totals bar chart" is visible
Verify element "top expenses list" is visible

title: Insights: Switching month updates the visible summary labels and content area
description: Verifies that changing the selected month triggers an update of the Insights content area without leaving the page.

title: Insights: Switching year updates the visible Insights content area
description: Verifies that changing the selected year triggers a refresh of the monthly summary and related sections.

steps.description: Verify element "daily totals bar chart" is visible

title: Insights: Daily totals bar chart is visible after scrolling
description: Verifies that the daily totals chart is present and can be brought into view on the Insights tab.

steps.description: Verify element "daily totals bar chart" is visible

title: Insights: Top lists remain visible when there is no data (placeholder rendering)
description: Verifies that top expenses and top income sections render placeholders/empty states instead of breaking when there are no transactions for the selected month.

steps.description: Verify text "No hay transacciones para este mes" is visible
Verify element "top income list" is visible

title: Switch to dark mode from default light mode
description: Verifies the user can toggle the app from light to dark mode from the header control.

steps.description: Verify element "Theme toggle button (moon/sun icon) in the header" is visible
Click the theme toggle button (moon/sun icon) in the header
Verify element "Dark theme icon/state (sun icon)" is visible

title: Switch back to light mode after enabling dark mode
description: Verifies the theme toggle is reversible in the same session (dark -> light).

steps.description: Click the theme toggle button (moon/sun icon) in the header
Click the theme toggle button (moon/sun icon) in the header
Verify element "Light theme icon/state (moon icon)" is visible

title: Theme toggle control remains available after switching tabs
description: Verifies the header theme toggle remains usable after navigating within the single-page app tabs.

steps.description: Verify element "Theme toggle button (moon/sun icon) in the header" is visible
Click the theme toggle button (moon/sun icon) in the header

title: Persist categories across a page refresh
description: Verifies that a newly added category is restored from localStorage after refreshing the app.

steps.description: Type "Comida" into the category name field
Click on the "Agregar" button for categories

title: Persist accounts (name and starting balance) across a page refresh
description: Verifies that a newly added account and its displayed balance are restored after refreshing the app.

steps.description: Type "Cuenta Nómina" into the account name field
Type "1000.00" into the initial balance field
Click on the "Agregar" button for accounts

title: Persist a transaction across a page refresh (with existing account)
description: Verifies that a newly added expense transaction is restored from localStorage after refreshing the app.

steps.description: Type "Cuenta Nómina" into the account name field
Type "1000.00" into the initial balance field
Click on the "Agregar" button for accounts
Type "Compra café" into the transaction description field
Click on the control to add the transaction

title: End-to-end persistence: category + account + transaction survive refresh and are visible in each tab
description: Verifies that categories, accounts, and transactions are all saved and restored correctly between sessions via localStorage.

steps.description: Type "Comida" into the category name field
Click on the "Agregar" button for categories
Type "Cuenta Nómina" into the account name field
Type "1000.00" into the initial balance field
Click on the "Agregar" button for accounts
Type "Compra café" into the transaction description field
Click on the control to add the transaction

title: Refreshing without changes does not remove existing stored data
description: Verifies that existing stored entries remain visible after multiple refreshes, confirming persistence is stable.

steps.description: Type "Comida" into the category name field
Click on the "Agregar" button for categories

title: Stored data remains available when switching tabs after a refresh
description: Verifies that after a refresh, switching between tabs still shows the restored persisted data consistently.

steps.description: Type "Cuenta Nómina" into the account name field
Type "1000.00" into the initial balance field
Click on the "Agregar" button for accounts
Verify text "Primero agrega una cuenta en la pestaña Cuentas" is not visible

title: Prevent adding a category with a repeated name
description: Verifies that attempting to add a category whose name already exists in the list is rejected: either an error message is shown or the duplicate is not added, so the category appears exactly once.

steps.description: Fill "Comida" into the category name input
Click "Agregar" button to add a category
Verify text "Comida" is visible in the categories list
Fill "Comida" into the category name input again
Click "Agregar" button to add a category
Verify that "Comida" appears exactly once in the categories list (no duplicate entries)
Verify an error or warning message such as "Ya existe una categoría con ese nombre" is visible, OR confirm the list still contains only one "Comida" entry
